programme.title: Movie contd - Alli Arjuna
programme.desc: Arivu lives with his friends in an old bungalow whose owner is fondly known as 'Daddy' and runs an eatery. Soon, Savitri enters his life after he offers to help her when her groom disappears.

programme.title: Pillaiyar Theru Kadasi Veedu
programme.desc: Ganesan loves Sandhya but fatefully his marriage is arranged with Valli, his uncle's daughter. But when he learns that Sandhya is terminally ill, he marries her and earns the wrath of his family.

programme.title: Singara Chittu
programme.desc: Murali marries Raji against the wishes of his mother. Worsening conditions force him to move out with his wife and kid. All plans to begin life anew come to a halt due to an unexpected turn of events.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Looty
programme.desc: Childless couple Rasappa and Geetha adopt the child abandoned in their car. However, problems ensue when Geetha suspects her husband to be the biological father of the child.

programme.title: Sri Raja Rajeshwari
programme.desc: Cast - Ramya Krishnan & Others

programme.title: Rajasthan
programme.desc: When terrorists infiltrate the Indian shores to attack the nuclear scientists, the government forms a special task force, which includes top policemen.

programme.title: Unakkagave Vazhukkiren
programme.desc: Ravi Shankar stops composing music after a tragedy occurs in his life. He meets Chitra who shares similar interests. Soon, he learns about her misery and realises he is responsible for it.

programme.title: Aanandham
programme.desc: Tirupathi, the eldest son in the family, works hard to raise his three brothers Madhavan, Kannan, and Surya. However, problems arise in the family when Madhavan's wife begins to rebel against him.

programme.title: Thaaikulamae Thaaikulamae
programme.desc: While on a business tour, circumstances force a married man to marry another woman. However, his first wife happens to learn about his second marriage.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Thaaikulamae Thaaikulamae
programme.desc: While on a business tour, circumstances force a married man to marry another woman. However, his first wife happens to learn about his second marriage.

programme.title: Aayiram Nilave Vaa
programme.desc: Twins Chander and Suri fall in love with the same girl. However, things take a turn when Chander accidentally kills Suri.

programme.title: Paattali Magan
programme.desc: Gopi, a poor farmer, falls in love and gets married to Radha, a rich landlord's daughter. However, Radha's stepmother, who is a cunning lady, plans to destroy the marriage by getting Gopi in trouble.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Thenkasi Pattinam
programme.desc: Kannan is in love with his childhood friend Meenakshi but keeps it a secret from his beloved friend Das. However, the friendship between them is ruined as Das falls in love with the same girl.

programme.title: Pudhu Nilavu
programme.desc: Madan breaks his friendship with Anand because the latter likes the same girl he does. However, Madan is extremely shocked when he makes a discovery about Anand.

programme.title: Vetri Vizha
programme.desc: After a fatal accident, a man suffers from amnesia. However, when flashes from his past help him discover his combat skills, he sets out on a mission to find his true identity.

programme.title: Jore
programme.desc: A righteous young man takes it upon himself the task of putting straight a powerful but corrupt politician in a village, who also happens to be the father of his love interest.

programme.title: Raajiyam
programme.desc: Karthikeyan runs a secret agency. When he proves that the governor's son has killed his own wife, the leader gets angry and decides to seek revenge.

programme.title: Magalirkkaga
programme.desc: Bhavani is a fair-minded inspector in an all-women police station. When a colleague is raped by a senior, she tries to bring him to justice. Her attempts are thwarted when her own fiance opposes her.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Magalirkkaga
programme.desc: Bhavani, an upright police inspector, is enraged when her colleague is raped by a senior officer. She sets out to bring the culprit to justice, but her attempts are thwarted by her fiance.

programme.title: Thozhan
programme.desc: Thozhan is a 2007 tamil -language musical action drama film directed by V. M. Vinu, starring Jayaram and Vimala Raman in the lead.

programme.title: Prasad
programme.desc: Shankar and Malathi are shocked to learn that their son cannot speak and hear. Undeterred, the boy, with the help of his parents, overcomes various odds and becomes a swimming champion.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Majunu
programme.desc: Vasanth, son of an MP, falls in love with Heena, who is believed to be the main suspect behind a bomb attack on his father. Vasanth secretly helps her return to Kolkata and soon follows to meet her.

programme.title: Veettukku Oru Kannagi
programme.desc: Sujatha, a writer, fights against the injustice done to her sister by her husband. However, she is shattered when her sister and daughter get killed and the culprit manages to escape from the law.

programme.title: Durga
programme.desc: Bholu and Champa decide to help Durga, a little girl, against her evil uncle. In the meanwhile, the evil uncle finds Devi, Durga's lookalike and uses her to confuse everyone and kill Durga.

programme.title: Paadu Nilave
programme.desc: When Balakrishnan, a police constable, expresses his love to a renowned singer, she rejects his advances. Balakrishnan feels insulted and decides to exact revenge on her.

programme.title: Kaappan
programme.desc: A special agent is assigned to protect the Indian prime minister who later gets assassinated. Following this, he is tasked with finding the man or group responsible for the assassination.

programme.title: KaruppaSamy Kuthagaitharar
programme.desc: Life goes on for the protagonist until Meenakshi stumbles upon in his life. An aspiring medical student, she relates Karan's benevolence to her late mother's. Soon after, they both become victim of the stupid cupid's bait.

programme.title: Chattambipaaru
programme.desc: Born into a humble, rustic background burdened by familial & financial struggles, Parvathi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch as she bravely faces the odds of life with an unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Peythozhiyaathe
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Charulatha, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Thenmavin kombath
programme.desc: Thenmavin kombath

programme.title: Swayamvarapanthal
programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife. Watch what destiny unfolds for Nandini & Surya

programme.title: Hridayam
programme.desc: In an unhappy marriage with a vicious wife, Dr.Niranjan's sole joy is his daughter Shruthi. While Sudhi & Devika believe they've found their soulmate in each other. But fate places them in a complex web of relationships when the couples cross paths.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Krishna Vamshi
programme.desc: Krishna Vamshi

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.

programme.title: Prem Protigya
programme.desc: Prem Protigya

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
